data.name: My Mistress
data.detailed_description:
My Mistress is a relaxing puzzle game that makes you happy. Finish the puzzle and enjoy yourself alone with the ladies!

Game Features

  • Unique artistic style
  • 24 charming ladies
  • 100 Achievements
  • Artbook can be operated with one hand
  • One-click to complete the puzzle

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
